video_generation_config.prompt: Cinematic high-action sequence. A heavily tattooed man (@tortiou5) with a gritty, ratchet demeanor walks casually toward a waiting Maybach. The car is a custom masterpiece: intricately painted in a multicolor pastel geometric wrap with pitch-black tinted headlights and taillights. He is wearing a black Vicuña tank top that reads 'Single Mother' with a graphic of clinking wine glasses. His skin is slick, sweating dark red Chianti. As he opens the door, sparks and debris fly everywhere as he is lit up by heavy enemy gunfire, but he remains impervious, unphased, and maintains a 'gangsta' swagger while puffing on a thick, hand-rolled cigar. The car peels out, tires smoking. SCENE TRANSITION: The frame fades to pitch black. Elegant, bold text appears: 'Adderall & Indica' (using two distinct, legible, high-contrast fonts). Beneath the title, the URL 'https://suno.com/tortious' is displayed, with 'https://', 'suno.com/', and 'tortious' each subtly highlighted in different soft pastel shades. Realistic 3D-rendered weed leaves and translucent pill capsules rain down from the top of the frame briefly as the title centers. Atmospheric lighting, grit, hyper-realistic textures, smell of gunpowder and expensive tobacco.
video_generation_config.negative_prompt: cartoon, 3D animation, anime, low resolution, blurry text, illegible URL, white wine, clean skin, no tattoos, cowardice, scared expression, peaceful, bright daylight, generic car, stock footage, watermark, signature, AI slop, devastatingly simple, static background, missing limbs
